title: Integrity is What Defines You

scenes.text: What do you do when no one is watching? That's your true character.
Integrity builds trust over time. It's a consistent habit, not an occasional act.
High performers uphold their values, even when it's inconvenient. That's mental toughness.
True integrity defines your legacy. It's the small, everyday choices that matter.
scenes.label: CHOOSE YOUR LEGACY

scenes.text: Follow for the mindset that gets it done.

description: Integrity is shown in the smallest choices, shaping your identity. Follow for daily reminders to build your integrity!
